summary: Comprehensive UI testing of Universal AI Dashboard Supervised Learning Engine. All 20 tests passed - verified regression training (House Prices), classification training (Loan Approval), metrics display, visualizations, navigation, and localStorage persistence.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Navigate to Analysis tab - PASSED
TEST 2: House Prices dataset profile shows 15 rows x 5 columns - PASSED
TEST 3: Task suggestion shows 'Regression' for price target - PASSED
TEST 4: Start Training button works and training completes - PASSED
TEST 5: Problem Type shows 'regression' - PASSED
TEST 6a: R² Score metric displayed - PASSED
TEST 6b: MAE metric displayed - PASSED
TEST 6c: RMSE metric displayed - PASSED
TEST 7: Train/Test Split shows 12 train / 3 test (80/20) - PASSED
TEST 8: Algorithm Leaderboard shows multiple models (3 models: linear_regression, ridge_regression, baseline) - PASSED
TEST 9: Predicted vs Actual scatter chart renders - PASSED
TEST 10: Feature Importance bar chart renders - PASSED
TEST 11: Loan Approval dataset - task detection shows 'Binary Classification' - PASSED
TEST 12a: Classification training completes successfully - PASSED
TEST 12b: Accuracy metric displayed (100.00%) - PASSED
TEST 12c: Precision metric displayed (100.00%) - PASSED
TEST 12d: Recall metric displayed (100.00%) - PASSED
TEST 13: Confusion Matrix renders - PASSED
TEST 14: Per-Class Metrics table renders - PASSED
TEST 15: Predictions tab shows active model card - PASSED
TEST 16: Dashboard Total Models count shows 1 after training - PASSED
TEST 17: Model Library shows trained models in table - PASSED
TEST 18: K-Means Clustering - scatter chart renders with 3 clusters - PASSED
TEST 19: Anomaly Detection - count card and scatter chart render - PASSED
TEST 20: localStorage persistence - models survive page reload - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Supervised Learning Engine is fully functional with regression and classification support
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for UI testing
Multiple algorithms (Linear Regression, Ridge Regression, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree) are trained and ranked in leaderboard
localStorage persistence is working correctly with hasLoadedFromStorage flag (race condition fix from iteration 3 still effective)
seed_data_creation: Used sample datasets: Loan Approval (binary classification - 20 rows), House Prices (regression - 15 rows), Insurance Costs (clustering/anomaly detection - 20 rows)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supervised Learning Engine fully verified: (1) Auto task detection working for regression/classification, (2) 80/20 train-test split correct, (3) Multiple algorithms trained and ranked in leaderboard, (4) R²/MAE/RMSE metrics for regression, Accuracy/Precision/Recall/Confusion Matrix for classification, (5) Scatter charts and feature importance charts rendering, (6) Model persistence via localStorage working. App is 100% client-side with no backend.
